scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install react-is --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: npm run db:setup --prefix backend && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
